sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Pfizer Inc. stock (US7170811035): Is its post-COVID pivot strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Pfizer is transitioning its business focus from COVID-related sales to oncology, vaccines, and rare disease treatments, aiming for sustained growth. The company's strategy involves internal innovation, strategic acquisitions like Seagen, and operational efficiency to achieve mid-single-digit revenue growth. While facing risks like patent cliffs and competition, analysts view Pfizer as undervalued, supported by its strong R&D pipeline, dividend yield, and continuous capital returns.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. stock (US46120E6023): Is its robotic surgery dominance strong enough for th
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (US46120E6023) dominates the robotic surgery market with its da Vinci systems, utilizing a "razor-and-blades" model where recurring revenue from instruments and services drives profitability. The company's expansion into new surgical specialties and focus on AI enhancements, coupled with favorable reimbursement policies in the U.S. and growing international adoption, suggests a strong position for future growth. However, competition from Medtronic and Johnson & Johnson, potential pricing pressures, and regulatory delays pose risks that investors should monitor.

feed.title: Stifel cuts General Mills stock price target on volume concerns By Investing.com
feed.summary: Stifel has lowered its price target for General Mills (NYSE:GIS) to $40 from $44, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment is attributed to continued volume softness in key categories and limited earnings growth projected for fiscal year 2027. Despite the recent 25% decline in stock price over the last six months, InvestingPro suggests the stock is undervalued, and it currently offers a 6.92% dividend yield.

feed.title: Neuronetics to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results and Host Conference Call
feed.summary: Neuronetics, Inc. (NASDAQ: STIM) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results before market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will also host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss these results.

feed.title: Gilead, Arcus tumble again in TIGIT, triggering 2 trial culls
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences and Arcus Biosciences are discontinuing their late-stage TIGIT drug domvanalimab due to futility in the STAR-121 lung cancer trial, leading Gilead to scale back its collaboration with Arcus. This failure also prompted the termination of another Phase 2 study and signifies a broader trend of disappointments in the TIGIT-targeting therapy space, following setbacks for other major pharmaceutical companies. Despite prior successes with domvanalimab in gastric cancers, the TIGIT class has largely proven unsuccessful, resulting in significant upfront investments that have not paid off.

feed.title: Inside Gaming: Strip casino operator unveils more summer deals
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment is offering various hotel, dining, and entertainment deals across its Las Vegas resorts for the summer, including discounts on stays, bundled packages, and spa/show specials. Meanwhile, J.P. Morgan analyst Daniel Politzer has outlined three potential scenarios for a realistic sale of Caesars Entertainment, valuing the company in the low-to-mid $30 per share range, with a management-led buyout being the most straightforward path. The article also covers the debut of a new slot game at Plaza, UNLV's upcoming gambling conference, and Resorts World Las Vegas naming a new international marketing executive.

feed.title: SurgePays Advances AI Decisioning Platform Focused on Increasing Revenue Per User Across the Subprime Market
feed.summary: SurgePays, Inc. announced the advancement of its AI decisioning platform, built on ProgramBenefits.com, to expand consumer interactions into multiple product opportunities within the subprime market. This system evaluates eligibility, predicts conversion probability, and ranks opportunities in real-time across various services like wireless, financial services, and healthcare savings. The goal is to materially increase revenue per user, improve capital efficiency, and support a more scalable growth model by leveraging user behavior and data to continuously improve decisioning accuracy.

feed.title: SurgePays wants one customer sign-up to unlock several offers with AI
feed.summary: SurgePays (NASDAQ: SURG) announced it is advancing a real-time AI decisioning platform built on ProgramBenefits.com to increase revenue per user across the subprime market. This platform evaluates eligibility, predicts conversion, and ranks multiple product opportunities in real-time, aiming to transform a single customer interaction into a multi-product revenue opportunity for wireless, financial services, and healthcare savings. The company expects this system to significantly boost revenue per user, improve capital efficiency, and support a more scalable growth model by constantly learning from user behavior.

feed.title: Neuronetics will post quarterly results before the market opens May 5
feed.summary: Neuronetics (NASDAQ: STIM) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results before market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will also host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. Investors can access the call via a live listen-only webcast or by registering for telephone participation.

feed.title: 3M cites ‘volatile environment’ as sales growth misses estimates
feed.summary: The article states that 3M missed its sales growth estimates and cited a "volatile environment" as the reason. Further details on the financial performance or specific challenges faced by the company are not provided in the snippet.

feed.title: Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE:PEG) Coverage Initiated by Analysts at Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial has initiated coverage on Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE:PEG) with a "hold" rating and a $91 price target. The utilities provider recently surpassed earnings expectations, reporting $0.72 EPS against an anticipated $0.71, and revenue of $2.92 billion compared to estimates of $2.68 billion. The company has also provided FY2026 guidance, forecasting an EPS range of $4.28 to $4.40.

feed.title: Susquehanna Adjusts Price Target on Diamondback Energy to $231 From $199, Maintains Positive Rating
feed.summary: Susquehanna has increased its price target for Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) to $231 from $199, while reaffirming a "Positive" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a more optimistic outlook on the energy company's future performance. Diamondback Energy specializes in the exploration and production of oil and natural gas, with a significant majority of its net sales coming from crude oil production.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q1 CY2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) reported Q1 CY2026 earnings, missing revenue expectations with sales down 40% year-on-year to $2.23 billion, significantly below analyst estimates. Despite the revenue miss and a slight miss on net interest margin, the company beat EPS estimates by 3.1% and showed strong long-term tangible book value per share growth. The stock traded down 1.1% immediately following the results, indicating a softer quarter overall.

feed.title: W.W. Grainger (NYSE:GWW) Given New $1,125.00 Price Target at Sanford C. Bernstein
feed.summary: Sanford C. Bernstein has increased its price target for W.W. Grainger (NYSE:GWW) to $1,125.00 from $1,052.00, maintaining a "market perform" rating, which implies a slight downside. The consensus among analysts is a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $1,118.14. Despite a slight EPS miss, the company reported a revenue beat and provided optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Uranium Royalty (NASDAQ:UROY) Raised to "Outperform" at Raymond James Financial
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has upgraded Uranium Royalty (NASDAQ:UROY) from "market perform" to "outperform," reflecting increased analyst optimism. This upgrade comes as the company beat earnings estimates with an EPS of $0.01 and significant institutional buying, with CenterBook Partners increasing its stake by 828.7%. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $4.50.

feed.title: Meritage Portfolio Management Sells 44,303 Shares of Fortinet, Inc. $FTNT
feed.summary: Meritage Portfolio Management significantly reduced its stake in Fortinet, Inc. by 31.9% in the fourth quarter, selling 44,303 shares. This reduction leaves the institutional investor with 94,455 shares valued at approximately $7.50 million. Concurrently, Fortinet's CEO Ken Xie and VP Michael Xie also sold substantial amounts of their holdings.

feed.title: General Electric Company Reports Earnings Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
feed.summary: General Electric Company announced its first-quarter 2026 earnings, reporting a revenue increase to USD 12,392 million from USD 9,935 million in the prior year. Despite the higher revenue, net income slightly decreased to USD 1,904 million from USD 1,978 million. Diluted earnings per share remained stable year-over-year at USD 1.81.

feed.title: Wells Fargo CEO: Trump entitled to his own Fed views
feed.summary: Wells Fargo CEO Charlie Scharf stated that while the Federal Reserve's independence is crucial, President Donald Trump is entitled to express his views on the central bank. Scharf also noted a consensus against lowering interest rates currently, particularly due to the ongoing Iran war, which he believes makes such a move wrong. He highlighted the "very, very open conversation" between the Trump administration and the banking industry, contrasting it with the previous White House.

feed.title: Argus reiterates Vulcan Materials stock rating on growth outlook
feed.summary: Argus has reiterated a Buy rating and a $327.00 price target for Vulcan Materials Company (NYSE:VMC), citing the company's strong financial health and growth prospects. Despite a recent 3% decline in shares, Argus sees the weakness as a buying opportunity, expecting improved demand for construction materials due to anticipated interest rate cuts and a recovering housing market. The firm also highlighted Vulcan Materials' sustainable growth through acquisitions and margin expansion.

feed.title: BlackRock, Inc's long position in Meitu increases to 5.56% on April 15 from 4.55% - HKEX
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc.'s long position in Meitu, Inc. has increased to 5.56% as of April 15, up from its previous holding of 4.55%. This change in stake was reported through the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX). The article also notes other recent investment activities in Meitu by different firms.

feed.title: PG&E Approves Tesla Cybertruck For First-Of-Its-Kind Grid Program
feed.summary: PG&E has approved the Tesla Cybertruck for its residential Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) program in California, allowing customers to use Tesla's Powershare technology to power homes during outages and sell electricity back to the grid. This pilot program is the state's first AC-based vehicle-to-grid system, simplifying hardware and potentially accelerating EV adoption by treating them as flexible energy assets. PG&E (NYSE: PCG) stock shows a short-term bearish trend but intermediate strength, with upcoming earnings expected on April 23, 2026.

feed.title: Northern Trust's Q1 earnings exceed estimates on improved credit quality, revenue lags (NTRS:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Northern Trust (NTRS) reported first-quarter GAAP EPS of $2.71, surpassing analyst estimates by $0.38, driven by improved credit quality in its commercial and institutional portfolio. However, the company's Q1 revenue of $2.21 billion, while up 13.3% year-over-year, missed expectations. This indicates a mixed financial performance with strong earnings due to credit quality but lagging revenue growth.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts NiSource Price Target to $55 From $53, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for NiSource (NI) to $55 from $53, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the analyst firm for the multiline utility company. NiSource is involved in natural gas distribution and electricity production, transmission, and distribution.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. stock (US0079031078): Is AI chip leadership strong enough to unlock sustained upside?
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is strategically positioned in the semiconductor industry, leveraging its high-performance chips for AI, gaming, and cloud computing. The company's fabless model and focus on high-growth segments like data centers with its Instinct AI accelerators make it a strong contender against Nvidia and Intel. Investors, particularly in the U.S., find AMD appealing due to its product diversification, competitive advantages in AI software, and alignment with national tech initiatives.

feed.title: Stephens cuts EQT stock price target to $73 on updated forecast
feed.summary: Stephens has lowered its price target for EQT Corp. (NYSE:EQT) to $73 from $78, while maintaining an Overweight rating. This adjustment reflects an updated price forecast, despite the firm's belief that EQT's current stock price of $57 is below its fair value, suggesting potential upside. EQT recently received a BBB upgrade from Fitch, becoming the first natural gas company to achieve this rating, and is focusing on net debt reduction, supported by strong financials and integrated assets.

feed.title: Here's What to Expect From AES Corporation's Next Earnings Report
feed.summary: The AES Corporation (AES) is expected to announce strong Q1 2026 earnings, with analysts forecasting a significant profit increase to $0.50 per share. Despite missing revenue forecasts in Q4 and having a "Hold" rating from analysts with a modest price target, AES shares have outperformed market indexes due to strong renewable energy capacity growth and signed power purchase agreements.

feed.title: ADP: Weekly US employment up by 54,750
feed.summary: The ADP report indicates a weekly increase in US employment by 54,750 jobs. This figure provides insight into the current state of the labor market.

feed.title: US private employers added 54,750 jobs a week in early April
feed.summary: ADP's NER Pulse reported that U.S. private employers added an average of 54,750 jobs per week for the four weeks ending April 4, 2026, marking the fifth consecutive week of improved hiring. These preliminary, seasonally adjusted figures are subject to revision and show a significant increase from prior weekly averages. Despite the positive employment data, ADP's stock performance has shown mixed or negative reactions, suggesting investor focus on other factors.

feed.title: UnitedHealth boosts full-year outlook after strong first quarter performance
feed.summary: UnitedHealth has raised its full-year adjusted earnings guidance by 50 cents per share following strong first-quarter performance. This announcement led to a more than 7% jump in its shares during pre-market trading. The health insurance giant's improved outlook signals confidence in its financial trajectory for the year.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Paycom Software to $183 From $210, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has adjusted its price target for Paycom Software (PAYC) to $183, down from $210, while reiterating a "Buy" rating on the stock. This update reflects a revised valuation perspective from the firm. Despite the lowered price target, the maintained buy rating suggests continued confidence in the company's long-term prospects.

feed.title: TETH ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns BOATS:TETH
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the 21Shares Ethereum ETF (TETH), detailing its dividends, returns, and key features. It highlights that TETH aims to track the spot price of ether, offering accessibility to ether without direct handling, and is backed by ether held in cold storage. The ETF also pays dividends, with a reported 0.39% yield and recent dividend growth.

feed.title: MGM Grand Buffet to shut down after 33 years
feed.summary: The MGM Grand Buffet in Las Vegas is scheduled to permanently close on May 31, 2026, after 33 years of operation. This closure reflects a broader trend in Las Vegas where resorts are moving away from traditional all-you-can-eat buffets, which were once loss leaders to attract gamblers, towards higher-end dining experiences. The change leaves only seven traditional buffets on the Las Vegas Strip, down from approximately 35 in 2000, and signals a shift in the region's hospitality model.

feed.title: Forget the Dividend Narrative. Coca-Cola Has Quietly Pivoted Its Growth Strategy.
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is undergoing a quiet growth pivot, focusing on internal transformation rather than relying solely on its dividend narrative. This strategy involves keeping and fixing its Costa Coffee business after an unsuccessful sale attempt and creating a chief digital officer role to centralize and accelerate digital initiatives. These moves, alongside strong organic revenue growth and expanding its Coca-Cola Zero Sugar unit, indicate a shift towards becoming a compounding consumer brand rather than just a static bond-proxy.

feed.title: DR Horton profits sink on affordability issues, weak confidence
feed.summary: DR Horton's second-quarter profits decreased by 20% due to affordability challenges and weak consumer confidence, though the homebuilder maintained its full-year guidance. Despite a drop in net income and revenues aligning with estimates, the company saw an 11% year-over-year increase in net sales orders. Executive chair David Auld expects sales incentives to remain high but is confident in meeting fiscal 2026 targets.

feed.title: Henry Schein to Release Q1 2026 Results
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results before the stock market opens on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will also provide a live webcast of its earnings conference call on the same day at 8:00 AM Eastern Time, featuring CEO Frederick M. Lowery and SVP and CFO Ronald N. South. Investors can access the live webcast and replay on the Henry Schein website.

feed.title: Walmart to upgrade 18 Colorado stores
feed.summary: Walmart plans to remodel 18 stores across Colorado this year, following similar upgrades to two dozen locations in 2025. These enhancements will include new signage, expanded online order services, wider aisles, and updated pharmacy and vision centers. The company has invested nearly $450 million in Colorado store upgrades and remodeling over the past five years.

feed.title: Raymond James reiterates Legend Biotech stock rating on strong trial data
feed.summary: Raymond James has reaffirmed its Outperform rating and an $86.00 price target for Legend Biotech Corp. following strong Phase 2 clinical trial data for its cilta-cel therapy in high-risk smoldering multiple myeloma. The data, presented at a cancer research conference and published in Nature Medicine, showed 100% MRD negativity and progression-free survival. This news comes as the company also reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, with revenues surpassing estimates and earnings per share beating projections, further supporting analyst confidence despite slight adjustments from other firms.

feed.title: Kaltura integrates video AI tools into major CMS platforms By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kaltura Inc. (NASDAQ:KLTR) has announced new integrations with Adobe Experience Manager, WordPress, and Drupal, enabling organizations to embed advanced video intelligence and AI-powered features directly into their content management systems. These integrations allow for the addition of conversational AI avatars, video analytics, interactive video, automatic captioning, and translation without requiring custom development. The company, with a $187 million market capitalization, reported $181 million in revenue over the last twelve months and expects to turn profitable this year, according to InvestingPro analysts.

feed.title: Conagra Brands Inc stock (US2058871029): Why does its grocery staples model matter more now?
feed.summary: Conagra Brands' business model, focused on affordable, essential grocery products, provides defensive stability for investors amidst economic uncertainty and shifting consumer habits. The company's emphasis on everyday essentials and portfolio optimization positions it as a resilient pick, appealing to investors in the United States and English-speaking markets who prioritize stability and dividends. However, risks such as commodity price volatility and private-label competition require vigilance.

feed.title: Sweden's Einride to deploy 75 electric trucks for Amazon's US freight
feed.summary: Swedish trucking company Einride has partnered with Amazon to deploy 75 manually operated electric heavy-duty trucks and their charging infrastructure across five US locations for Amazon's freight network. Einride's optimization software, Saga AI, will manage electric vehicle execution and charging. This partnership allows Amazon to advance its electrification efforts without owning all assets, following prior setbacks in the US electric trucking market.

feed.title: This biotech firm has room to run despite surging nearly 500% in past year, Morgan Stanley says
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley upgraded Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals to overweight, raising its price target to $100, citing more than 44.4% upside potential. The firm believes the biotech company has significant room for growth, particularly with anticipated positive data from its phase three clinical trials for Plozasiran, a treatment for severe hypertriglyceridemia. Despite a nearly 500% surge in the past year, analysts expect continued momentum from the underappreciated multi-billion dollar opportunity.

feed.title: $0.9899 payout marks Sunoco's sixth straight quarterly increase
feed.summary: Sunoco LP (NYSE: SUN) and SunocoCorp LLC (NYSE: SUNC) announced a significant increase of 6.25% in their quarterly distribution, bringing it to $0.9899 per common unit, or $3.9596 on an annualized basis. This marks the sixth consecutive quarterly increase for SUN, reflecting their ongoing financial stability, successful acquisitions, and confidence in future growth. The distribution will be paid on May 20, 2026, to holders of record as of May 8, 2026.

feed.title: Capri Sun Unveils ‘Hydrate,’ One of the First-to-Market Drinks with Electrolytes Designed Just for Kids
feed.summary: Capri Sun is expanding its product line with "Capri Sun Hydrate," a new drink specifically formulated for kids that includes electrolytes and Vitamin E, with 50 percent less sugar than leading regular sports drinks. This new product aims to address parents' demand for lower-sugar, hydrating options without artificial ingredients, while still offering flavors kids enjoy. Rolling out nationwide, Capri Sun Hydrate is positioned to support active children and reflects Kraft Heinz's commitment to innovation in functional beverages.

feed.title: SOPHiA GENETICS to Announce Financial Results for First Quarter 2026 on May 5, 2026
feed.summary: SOPHiA GENETICS (Nasdaq: SOPH) announced it will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 before U.S. markets open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 8:00 a.m. EDT / 2:00 p.m. CET to discuss the results and business outlook. A webcast of the call and a replay will be available on the SOPHiA GENETICS Investor Relations Website.

feed.title: 3 HR must-dos new business owners need to know
feed.summary: New business owners transitioning into employers face critical HR responsibilities. This article outlines three essential priorities: setting clear expectations through job descriptions and employee handbooks, managing compliance related to data security and regional regulations, and ensuring correct and timely payroll. Adhering to these principles fosters stability and builds a reliable work environment.

feed.title: SageGuard Financial Group LLC Invests $13.86 Million in Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: SageGuard Financial Group LLC has acquired a new stake of 28,652 shares in Lockheed Martin Corporation, valued at approximately $13.86 million, making it their 13th largest investment. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in the aerospace defense company. The article details Lockheed Martin's stock performance, recent earnings, dividend announcement, and a roundup of recent news and analyst ratings on the company.

feed.title: SageGuard Financial Group LLC Makes New Investment in International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: SageGuard Financial Group LLC has acquired a new position in International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) during the fourth quarter, purchasing 32,951 shares valued at approximately $9.76 million, making IBM its 20th largest holding. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their stakes in IBM, which currently sees 58.96% ownership by institutional investors and hedge funds. The article details IBM's stock performance, recent earnings, dividend announcement, and analyst sentiment, which ranges from positive regarding its AI and quantum computing initiatives to neutral/negative concerning AI software monetization risks.

feed.title: 7,251 Shares in The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. $GS Purchased by Jones Kertz & Associates Inc.
feed.summary: Jones Kertz & Associates Inc. recently acquired 7,251 shares of The Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE:GS) for approximately $6,374,000, making it their 10th largest holding. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Goldman Sachs, holding 71.21% of the company's stock. The article also covers Goldman Sachs' financial performance, including its recent earnings beat, dividend announcement, and a mix of analyst ratings and insider trading activities.

feed.title: Fifth Third presents 2026 annual meeting slides highlighting 2025 performance and community targets
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp released slides for its 2026 Annual Meeting, detailing its 2025 financial results and community commitments. Key highlights include 2025 financial metrics such as 1.19% return on average assets and a 56.9% efficiency ratio, along with significant increases in NIM and client growth. The bank also reported strong sustainability progress, delivering $58 billion towards its $100 billion target by 2030 and substantial CRA loans and charitable donations.

feed.title: SageGuard Financial Group LLC Invests $4.64 Million in AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: SageGuard Financial Group LLC has acquired a new position in AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) worth approximately $4.64 million, purchasing 186,800 shares during the fourth quarter. This move is part of broader institutional investor activity, with several other firms increasing their stakes in AT&T. Analysts generally have a "Moderate Buy" rating on the stock, with an average price target of $30.74, and the company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2775.
